abstract_zh: 我们研究在多个思维者（thinkers）提供的链式思维（Chain-of-Thought, CoT）监督下进行学习，这些思维者虽然都给出正确的解法，但可能具有系统性差异，例如不同思维者对同一数学问题所写出的分步解答，或解决同一问题的不同程序的逐步执行轨迹。我们关注那些在单个思维者的CoT监督下计算上易于学习，但在仅有最终结果监督（即无CoT）的情况下难以学习的类别（Joshi et al. 2025）。我们证明，在密码学假设下，仅从两个或少数几个不同思维者提供的CoT监督中学习，在被动数据收集设置下可能是困难的。另一方面，我们提出了一种通用且计算高效的主动学习算法：该算法仅需每个思维者少量的CoT数据，且该数量完全独立于目标精度 $\varepsilon$；所需思维者数量适中，随 $\log \frac{1}{\varepsilon} \log \log \frac{1}{\varepsilon}$ 增长；同时需要足够多的被动最终结果数据，其规模为 $\frac{1}{\varepsilon} \cdot \text{poly}\log\frac{1}{\varepsilon}$。

title: Less Is More: Engineering Challenges of On-Device Small Language Model Integration in a Mobile Application
authors: William Oliveira
abstract: On-device Small Language Models (SLMs) promise fully offline, private AI experiences for mobile users (no cloud dependency, no data leaving the device). But is this promise achievable in practice? This paper presents a longitudinal practitioner case study documenting the engineering challenges of integrating SLMs (Gemma 4 E2B, 2.6B parameters; Qwen3 0.6B, 600M parameters) into Palabrita, a production Android word-guessing game. Over a 5-day development sprint comprising 204 commits (~90 directly AI-related), the system underwent a radical transformation: from an ambitious design where the LLM generated complete structured puzzles (word, category, difficulty, and five hints as JSON) to a pragmatic architecture where curated word lists provide the words and the LLM generates only three short hints, with a deterministic fallback if it fails. We identify five categories of failures specific to on-device SLM integration: output format violations, constraint violations, context quality degradation, latency incompatibility, and model selection instability. For each failure category, we document the observed symptoms, root causes, and the prompt engineering and architectural strategies that effectively mitigated them, including multi-layer defensive parsing, contextual retry with failure feedback, session rotation, progressive prompt hardening, and systematic responsibility reduction. Our findings demonstrate that on-device SLMs are viable for production mobile applications, but only when the developer accepts a fundamental constraint: the most reliable on-device LLM feature is one where the LLM does the least. We distill our experience into eight actionable design heuristics for practitioners integrating SLMs into mobile apps.
title_zh: 少即是多：移动应用中设备端小型语言模型集成的工程挑战
abstract_zh:
在设备端运行的小型语言模型（SLMs）为移动用户提供了完全离线、私密的AI体验（无需依赖云端，数据不离开设备）。然而，这一承诺在实践中是否真正可行？本文通过一项纵向的实践者案例研究，详细记录了将SLMs（Gemma 4 E2B，26亿参数；Qwen3 0.6B，6亿参数）集成到Palabrita——一款生产环境下的Android猜词游戏——过程中所面临的工程挑战。在为期5天的开发冲刺中，共提交204次代码变更（约90次直接与AI相关），系统经历了根本性转变：从最初雄心勃勃的设计——由大语言模型生成完整的结构化谜题（包括单词、类别、难度及五个提示，以JSON格式输出），转变为一种务实的架构——使用精心筛选的词汇表提供单词，而大语言模型仅负责生成三个简短提示，并在失败时启用确定性回退机制。

我们识别出五类与设备端SLM集成相关的特有故障类型：输出格式违规、约束条件违反、上下文质量下降、延迟不兼容，以及模型选择不稳定。针对每一类故障，本文记录了其表现症状、根本原因，并提出了有效的提示工程与架构策略来缓解问题，包括多层防御性解析、基于失败反馈的上下文重试、会话轮换、逐步强化提示（progressive prompt hardening），以及系统性责任削减。我们的研究结果表明，设备端SLM在生产级移动应用中是可行的，但前提是开发者必须接受一个基本前提：最可靠的设备端LLM功能，恰恰是让LLM承担最少任务的功能。

基于上述经验，我们提炼出八条可操作的设计启发原则，供希望在移动应用中集成SLMs的开发者参考。

title: Skill Retrieval Augmentation for Agentic AI
authors: Weihang Su, Jianming Long, Qingyao Ai, Yichen Tang, Changyue Wang, Yiteng Tu, Yiqun Liu
abstract: As large language models (LLMs) evolve into agentic problem solvers, they increasingly rely on external, reusable skills to handle tasks beyond their native parametric capabilities. In existing agent systems, the dominant strategy for incorporating skills is to explicitly enumerate available skills within the context window. However, this strategy fails to scale: as skill corpora expand, context budgets are consumed rapidly, and the agent becomes markedly less accurate in identifying the right skill. To this end, this paper formulates Skill Retrieval Augmentation (SRA), a new paradigm in which agents dynamically retrieve, incorporate, and apply relevant skills from large external skill corpora on demand. To make this problem measurable, we construct a large-scale skill corpus and introduce SRA-Bench, the first benchmark for decomposed evaluation of the full SRA pipeline, covering skill retrieval, skill incorporation, and end-task execution. SRA-Bench contains 5,400 capability-intensive test instances and 636 manually constructed gold skills, which are mixed with web-collected distractor skills to form a large-scale corpus of 26,262 skills. Extensive experiments show that retrieval-based skill augmentation can substantially improve agent performance, validating the promise of the paradigm. At the same time, we uncover a fundamental gap in skill incorporation: current LLM agents tend to load skills at similar rates, regardless of whether a gold skill is retrieved or whether the task actually requires external capabilities. This shows that the bottleneck in skill augmentation lies not only in retrieval but also in the base model's ability to determine which skill to load and when external loading is actually needed. These findings position SRA as a distinct research problem and establish a foundation for the scalable augmentation of capabilities in future agent systems.
title_zh: 智能体AI的技能检索增强
abstract_zh: 随着大型语言模型（LLMs）逐渐演变为具备自主能力的问题求解者，它们越来越多地依赖于外部可复用的技能来处理超出其固有参数化能力范围的任务。在现有的智能体系统中，主流策略是将可用技能显式地列在上下文窗口内。然而，这种策略难以扩展：随着技能库规模的扩大，上下文预算迅速耗尽，智能体在识别正确技能时的准确性显著下降。为此，本文提出了“技能检索增强”（Skill Retrieval Augmentation, SRA）这一新范式，使智能体能够按需从大规模外部技能库中动态检索、整合并应用相关技能。为使该问题可度量，我们构建了一个大规模技能库，并引入SRA-Bench——首个用于分解评估完整SRA流程的基准测试，涵盖技能检索、技能整合以及最终任务执行三个环节。SRA-Bench包含5,400个高能力需求的测试实例和636个手工构建的黄金技能，这些黄金技能与网络收集的干扰技能混合，形成一个包含26,262项技能的大规模技能库。大量实验表明，基于检索的技能增强能显著提升智能体性能，验证了该范式的潜力。同时，我们也发现技能整合环节存在一个根本性缺陷：当前的LLM智能体无论是否成功检索到黄金技能，或任务是否真正需要外部能力，都倾向于以相似的频率加载技能。这表明，技能增强的瓶颈不仅在于检索环节，更在于基础模型判断应加载何种技能以及何时真正需要外部加载的能力。这些发现使SRA成为一个独立的研究课题，并为未来智能体系统中能力的可扩展增强奠定了基础。

title: Aligned Multi-View Scripts for Universal Chart-to-Code Generation
authors: Zhihan Zhang, Lizi Liao
abstract: Chart-to-code generation converts a chart image into an executable plotting script, enabling faithful reproduction and editable visualizations. Existing methods are largely Python-centric, limiting practical use and overlooking a critical source of supervision: the same chart can be expressed by semantically equivalent scripts in different plotting languages. To fill this gap, we introduce Chart2NCode, a dataset of 176K charts paired with aligned scripts in Python, R, and LaTeX that render visually equivalent outputs, constructed via a metadata-to-template pipeline with rendering verification and human quality checks. Building on a LLaVA-style architecture, we further propose CharLuMA, a parameter-efficient adaptation module that augments the multimodal projector with a language-conditioned mixture of low-rank subspaces, allowing the model to share core chart understanding while specializing code generation to the target language through lightweight routing. Extensive experiments show consistent gains in executability and visual fidelity across all languages, outperforming strong open-source baselines and remaining competitive with proprietary systems. Further analyses reveal that balanced multi-language supervision benefits all languages and that the adapter allocates a compact shared core plus language-specific capacity. Codes and data are available at https://github.com/Zhihan72/CharLuMA.
title_zh: 对齐的多视图脚本用于通用图表到代码生成
abstract_zh: 图表到代码的生成技术能够将图表图像转换为可执行的绘图脚本，从而实现可视化结果的精准复现与可编辑性。现有的方法大多局限于Python语言，这限制了其实际应用，并忽视了一个关键的监督信号：同一张图表可以用不同绘图语言编写出语义等价的脚本。为填补这一空白，我们提出了Chart2NCode数据集，该数据集包含17.6万张图表及其在Python、R和LaTeX中对齐的脚本，这些脚本能生成视觉上等效的输出。数据集通过基于元数据的模板生成流程构建，并经过渲染验证和人工质量检查。在此基础上，我们进一步提出CharLuMA，一种基于LLaVA风格架构的参数高效适配模块。该模块通过引入语言条件控制的低秩子空间混合机制，增强多模态投影器，使模型能够在共享核心图表理解能力的同时，通过轻量级路由机制，针对目标语言进行代码生成的专门化。大量实验表明，CharLuMA在所有语言中均显著提升了代码可执行性和视觉保真度，优于多个强大的开源基线模型，并在性能上保持与专有系统相当的竞争力。进一步分析显示，均衡的多语言监督对所有语言均有益处，且该适配器能够分配一个紧凑的共享核心加上特定于语言的容量。代码与数据已公开，获取地址为：https://github.com/Zhihan72/CharLuMA。

title: When Prompt Under-Specification Improves Code Correctness: An Exploratory Study of Prompt Wording and Structure Effects on LLM-Based Code Generation
authors: Amal AKLI, Mike PAPADAKIS, Maxime CORDY, Yves Le TRAON
abstract: Large language models are increasingly used for code generation, yet the correctness of their outputs depends not only on model capability but also on how tasks are specified. Prior studies demonstrate that small changes in natural language prompts, particularly under-specification can substantially reduce code correctness; however, these findings are largely based on minimal-specification benchmarks such as HumanEval and MBPP, where limited structural redundancy may exaggerate sensitivity. In this exploratory study, we investigate how prompt structure, task complexity, and specification richness interact with LLM robustness to prompt mutations. We evaluate 10 different models across HumanEval and the structurally richer LiveCodeBench. Our results reveal that robustness is not a fixed property of LLMs but is highly dependent on prompt structure: the same under-specification mutations that degrade performance on HumanEval have near-zero net effect on LiveCodeBench due to redundancy across descriptions, constraints, examples, and I/O conventions. Surprisingly, we also find that prompt mutations can improve correctness. In LiveCodeBench, under-specification often breaks misleading lexical or structural cues that trigger incorrect retrieval-based solution strategies, leading to correctness improvements that counterbalance degradations. Manual analysis identifies consistent mechanisms behind these improvements, including the disruption of over-fitted terminology, removal of misleading constraints, and elimination of spurious identifier triggers. Overall, our study shows that structurally rich task descriptions can substantially mitigate the negative effects of under-specification and, in some cases, even enhance correctness. We outline categories of prompt modifications that positively influence the behavior of LLM code-generation, offering practical insights for writing robust prompts.
title_zh: 当提示信息不明确时反而能提升代码正确性：关于提示措辞与结构对基于大语言模型的代码生成影响的探索性研究
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型在代码生成中的应用日益广泛，然而其输出的正确性不仅取决于模型本身的能力，还与任务描述的方式密切相关。先前的研究表明，自然语言提示中的微小变化，尤其是描述不充分的情况，会显著降低代码的正确率；但这些发现主要基于结构较为简单的基准测试集（如HumanEval和MBPP），在这些数据集中，由于结构冗余有限，模型对提示的敏感性被放大了。在本项探索性研究中，我们考察了提示结构、任务复杂度以及描述丰富性如何与大语言模型对提示变异的鲁棒性相互作用。我们在HumanEval和结构更丰富的LiveCodeBench两个基准上评估了10种不同模型的表现。结果表明，鲁棒性并非大语言模型固有的固定属性，而是高度依赖于提示结构：同样的描述不充分的提示变异，在HumanEval上会严重损害性能，但在LiveCodeBench上几乎无明显影响，原因在于后者在描述、约束、示例及输入输出规范之间存在丰富的冗余信息。令人意外的是，我们还发现提示变异有时反而能提升代码正确率。在LiveCodeBench中，描述不充分常常破坏那些误导性的词汇或结构线索，而这些线索原本会诱使模型采用错误的基于检索的解题策略，从而导致正确率提升，抵消了部分性能下降。人工分析揭示了这些提升背后的稳定机制，包括打破过度拟合的术语、移除误导性约束、消除虚假标识符触发等。总体而言，本研究表明，结构丰富的任务描述能够显著缓解描述不充分带来的负面影响，甚至在某些情况下还能提高正确率。我们归纳出若干对大语言模型代码生成行为具有积极影响的提示修改类别，为编写更具鲁棒性的提示提供了实用指导。

title: Defective Task Descriptions in LLM-Based Code Generation: Detection and Analysis
authors: Amal Akli, Mike Papadakis, Maxime Cordy, Yves Le Traon
abstract: Large language models are widely used for code generation, yet they rely on an implicit assumption that the task descriptions are sufficiently detailed and well-formed. However, in practice, users may provide defective descriptions, which can have a strong effect on code correctness. To address this issue, we develop SpecValidator, a lightweight classifier based on a small model that has been parameter-efficiently finetuned, to automatically detect task description defects. We evaluate SpecValidator on three types of defects, Lexical Vagueness, Under-Specification and Syntax-Formatting on 3 benchmarks with task descriptions of varying structure and complexity. Our results show that SpecValidator achieves defect detection of F1 = 0.804 and MCC = 0.745, significantly outperforming GPT-5-mini (F1 = 0.469 and MCC = 0.281) and Claude Sonnet 4 (F1 = 0.518 and MCC = 0.359). Perhaps more importantly, our analysis indicates that SpecValidator can generalize to unseen issues and detect unknown Under-Specification defects in the original (real) descriptions of the benchmarks used. Our results also show that the robustness of LLMs in task description defects depends primarily on the type of defect and the characteristics of the task description, rather than the capacity of the model, with Under-Specification defects being the most severe. We further found that benchmarks with richer contextual grounding, such as LiveCodeBench, exhibit substantially greater resilience, highlighting the importance of structured task descriptions for reliable LLM-based code generation.
title_zh: 基于大语言模型的代码生成中的缺陷任务描述：检测与分析
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型在代码生成中得到了广泛应用，但其依赖于一个隐含假设：任务描述足够详细且格式规范。然而，在实际应用中，用户提供的描述可能存在缺陷，这些缺陷会对代码的正确性产生显著影响。为解决这一问题，我们开发了SpecValidator——一种基于经过参数高效微调的小型模型的轻量级分类器，可自动检测任务描述中的缺陷。我们在三个基准数据集上对SpecValidator进行了评估，涵盖三类缺陷：词汇模糊性（Lexical Vagueness）、描述不充分（Under-Specification）以及语法与格式错误（Syntax-Formatting），这些数据集的任务描述具有不同的结构和复杂度。实验结果表明，SpecValidator在缺陷检测上的F1值达到0.804，MCC值为0.745，显著优于GPT-5-mini（F1=0.469，MCC=0.281）和Claude Sonnet 4（F1=0.518，MCC=0.359）。更重要的是，我们的分析显示，SpecValidator能够泛化到未见过的问题，并有效检测出原始（真实）基准数据集中未知的“描述不充分”缺陷。此外，研究还发现，大语言模型在面对任务描述缺陷时的鲁棒性主要取决于缺陷类型及任务描述本身的特征，而非模型规模；其中，“描述不充分”缺陷的影响最为严重。我们进一步发现，具备更丰富上下文支撑的基准（如LiveCodeBench）表现出显著更强的抗干扰能力，凸显了结构化任务描述对于实现可靠的大语言模型代码生成的重要性。

title: NeuroClaw Technical Report
authors: Cheng Wang, Zhibin He, Zhihao Peng, Shengyuan Liu, Yufan Hu, Lichao Sun, Xiang Li, Yixuan Yuan
abstract: Agentic artificial intelligence systems promise to accelerate scientific workflows, but neuroimaging poses unique challenges: heterogeneous modalities (sMRI, fMRI, dMRI, EEG), long multi-stage pipelines, and persistent reproducibility risks. To address this gap, we present NeuroClaw, a domain-specialized multi-agent research assistant for executable and reproducible neuroimaging research. NeuroClaw operates directly on raw neuroimaging data across formats and modalities, grounding decisions in dataset semantics and BIDS metadata so users need not prepare curated inputs or bespoke model code. The platform combines harness engineering with end-to-end environment management, including pinned Python environments, Docker support, automated installers for common neuroimaging tools, and GPU configuration. In practice, this layer emphasizes checkpointing, post-execution verification, structured audit traces, and controlled runtime setup, making toolchains more transparent while improving reproducibility and auditability. A three-tier skill/agent hierarchy separates user-facing interaction, high-level orchestration, and low-level tool skills to decompose complex workflows into safe, reusable units. Alongside the NeuroClaw framework, we introduce NeuroBench, a system-level benchmark for executability, artifact validity, and reproducibility readiness. Across multiple multimodal LLMs, NeuroClaw-enabled runs yield consistent and substantial score improvements compared with direct agent invocation. Project homepage: https://cuhk-aim-group.github.io/NeuroClaw/index.html
title_zh: 神经爪技术报告
abstract_zh: 代理型人工智能系统有望加速科学工作流程，但神经影像学研究面临独特挑战：模态异质性（sMRI、fMRI、dMRI、EEG）、复杂的多阶段处理流程，以及持续存在的可重复性风险。为填补这一空白，我们提出NeuroClaw——一个面向神经影像学领域的专用多智能体研究助手，致力于实现可执行且可重复的神经影像研究。NeuroClaw可直接处理跨格式、跨模态的原始神经影像数据，其决策基于数据集语义和BIDS元数据，用户无需预先准备标注数据或编写定制化模型代码。该平台融合了工具链工程与端到端环境管理，包括固定版本的Python环境、Docker支持、常用神经影像工具的自动化安装器，以及GPU配置功能。在实际应用中，该层强调检查点机制、执行后验证、结构化审计日志和受控运行时设置，使工具链更加透明，同时显著提升研究的可重复性与可审计性。NeuroClaw采用三级技能/智能体层级架构，将用户交互、高层编排与底层工具技能分离，从而将复杂工作流分解为安全、可复用的单元。与此同时，我们还推出了NeuroBench——一个用于评估可执行性、成果有效性及可重复性准备度的系统级基准测试框架。在多个多模态大语言模型上，使用NeuroClaw支持的运行任务相比直接调用智能体，均展现出一致且显著的性能提升。项目主页：https://cuhk-aim-group.github.io/NeuroClaw/index.html

title: System-aware contextual digital twin for ICS anomaly diagnosis
authors: Eungyu Woo, Yooshin Kim, Wonje Heo, Donghoon Shin
abstract: Industrial Control Systems (ICS) integrate computing, physical processes, and communication to operate critical infrastructures such as power grids, water treatment plants, and oil and gas facilities. As ICS become increasingly targeted by cyberattacks, timely and reliable anomaly diagnosis is essential for protecting operational safety. However, existing ICS anomaly detection approaches face practical limitations: supervised methods require extensive labeled attack data and suffer from class imbalance, while model-based detectors often lack the ability to provide deep insight into the root causes of anomalies, leading to elevated false alarms and making it difficult for operators to initiate a timely response. In this work, we propose a system-aware unsupervised framework for ICS anomaly diagnosis that combines lightweight online detection with contextual explanation. The system identifies deviations from observed normal behaviors without prior knowledge of system topology. To support actionable response, we further concatenate a contextual digital twin augmented with an Large Language Model (LLM) to enhance interpretability, which translates detection evidence into grounded diagnostic hypotheses and verification steps for operators. Experiments on public ICS benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves real-time detection efficiency and provides consistent, interpretable anomaly diagnoses, enabling low-latency warning and practical deployment in complex industrial environments.
title_zh: 面向工业控制系统的系统感知上下文数字孪生异常诊断
abstract_zh: 工业控制系统（ICS）将计算、物理过程与通信技术融合，用于运行电力网络、水处理厂以及油气设施等关键基础设施。随着ICS日益成为网络攻击的目标，及时且可靠的异常诊断对于保障运行安全至关重要。然而，现有的ICS异常检测方法存在实际应用局限：监督式方法需要大量标注的攻击数据，且易受类别不平衡问题影响；而基于模型的检测器通常难以深入揭示异常的根本原因，导致误报率升高，使操作人员难以及时响应。本文提出一种面向系统的无监督异常诊断框架，结合轻量级在线检测与上下文解释能力。该系统能够在无需预先了解系统拓扑的情况下，识别出与正常行为模式的偏差。为进一步支持可操作的响应，我们进一步引入一个融合大型语言模型（LLM）的上下文数字孪生体，以增强诊断结果的可解释性，将检测证据转化为有依据的诊断假设及供操作人员验证的步骤。在公开的ICS基准数据集上的实验表明，所提出的框架实现了实时检测效率，并能提供一致且可解释的异常诊断，从而支持低延迟预警，并可在复杂的工业环境中实现实际部署。

title: Exploring Creativity in Human-Human-LLM Collaborative Software Design
authors: Victoria Jackson, Grischa Liebel, Rafael Prikladnicki, Andre van der Hoek
abstract: While the use of Large Language Models (LLMs) in programming has been extensively studied, there is limited understanding of how LLMs support collaborative work where creativity plays a central role. Software design, as a collaborative and creative activity, provides a valuable context for exploring the influence of LLMs on creativity. This study investigates how and where creativity naturally emerges when software designers collaborate with an LLM during a design task. In a laboratory setting simulating a workplace environment, 18 pairs of software professionals with design experience were asked to complete a design task. Each pair had 90 minutes to produce a software design based on a set of requirements, with optional access to a custom LLM interface. Pairs were not primed to be creative. We find that creativity was present in all pairs in design processes, with 13 producing design documents containing creativity. We primarily attribute creativity to the human designers, driven by traits such as prior experience, empathy, and the use of analogies. The LLM contributed by producing novel ideas and elaborating human ideas. However, in some cases, the LLM appeared to hinder creativity by suggesting complex solutions or adding to unproductive digressions. LLMs can support creativity in collaborative software design, but human insights remain central. To effectively augment human creativity, designers must be intentional in their engagement with LLMs.
title_zh: 探索人-人-大语言模型协同软件设计中的创造力
abstract_zh: 尽管大型语言模型（LLMs）在编程中的应用已得到广泛研究，但关于LLMs如何支持以创造力为核心要素的协作工作，目前仍缺乏深入理解。软件设计作为一种具有协作性和创造性的活动，为探讨LLMs对创造力的影响提供了宝贵的场景。本研究旨在探究在软件设计师与LLMs协作完成设计任务时，创造力在何时何地自然涌现。在模拟真实工作环境的实验室情境中，18对具有设计经验的软件专业人士被要求完成一项设计任务。每对参与者有90分钟时间，根据一组需求制定软件设计方案，并可选择性使用定制化的LLM界面。各组未被预先引导以追求创造性。研究发现，所有小组的设计过程中均体现出创造力，其中13组的设计文档包含明显的创造性内容。我们主要将创造力归因于人类设计师，其驱动力来自过往经验、同理心以及类比思维等特质。LLM则通过提出新颖想法并丰富人类构思来发挥作用。然而，在某些情况下，LLM也表现出抑制创造力的倾向，例如提出过于复杂的解决方案或引发无益的偏离讨论。总体而言，LLMs能够在协作式软件设计中促进创造力，但人类的洞察力依然处于核心地位。要有效增强人类创造力，设计师必须在与LLMs互动时保持主动和有意识的参与。

title: Leveraging LLMs for Multi-File DSL Code Generation: An Industrial Case Study
authors: Sivajeet Chand, Kevin Nguyen, Peter Kuntz, Alexander Pretschner
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) perform strongly on general-purpose code generation, yet their applicability to enterprise domain-specific languages (DSLs) remains underexplored, especially for repository-scale change generation spanning multiple files and folder structures from a single natural-language (NL) instruction. We report an industrial case study at BMW that adapts code-oriented LLMs to generate and modify project-root DSL artifacts for an Xtext-based DSL that drives downstream Java/TypeScript code generation. We develop an end-to-end pipeline for dataset construction, multi-file task representation, model adaptation, and evaluation. We encode DSL folder hierarchies as structured, path-preserving JSON, allowing single-response generation at repository scale and learning cross-file dependencies. We evaluate two instruction-tuned code LLMs (Qwen2.5-Coder and DeepSeek-Coder, 7B) under three configurations: baseline prompting, one-shot in-context learning, and parameter-efficient fine-tuning (QLoRA). Beyond standard similarity metrics, we introduce task-specific measures that assess edit correctness and repository structural fidelity. Fine-tuning yields the most significant gains across models and metrics, achieving high exact-match accuracy, substantial edit similarity, and structural fidelity of 1.00 on our held-out set for multi-file outputs. At the same time, one-shot in-context learning provides smaller but consistent improvements over baseline prompting. We further validate practical utility via an expert developer survey and an execution-based check using the existing code generator.
title_zh: 利用大语言模型进行多文件DSL代码生成：一项工业案例研究
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在通用代码生成任务中表现优异，但其在企业领域特定语言（DSL）中的应用仍缺乏深入探索，尤其是在仅凭单一自然语言（NL）指令实现跨多个文件和目录结构的仓库级代码变更生成方面。本文报告了宝马公司的一项工业案例研究，将面向代码的LLM适配用于生成和修改基于Xtext的DSL项目根目录下的DSL构件，该DSL驱动后续Java/TypeScript代码的自动生成。我们构建了一个端到端的流程，涵盖数据集构建、多文件任务表示、模型适配与评估。通过将DSL目录层级结构编码为结构化且路径保持不变的JSON格式，实现了在仓库规模上的单次响应生成，并支持学习跨文件依赖关系。我们在三种配置下评估了两款经过指令微调的代码LLM（Qwen2.5-Coder 和 DeepSeek-Coder，均为7B参数量）：基础提示（baseline prompting）、单样本上下文学习（one-shot in-context learning）以及参数高效微调（QLoRA）。除了标准的相似性指标外，我们引入了任务相关的度量方法，用以评估编辑正确性和仓库结构保真度。结果表明，微调在所有模型和指标上均带来最显著的提升，在保留测试集上的多文件输出中达到了极高的精确匹配准确率、显著的编辑相似性以及1.00的结构保真度。同时，单样本上下文学习也相较于基础提示带来了较小但稳定的性能改进。此外，我们通过专家开发者调查及基于现有代码生成器的执行验证，进一步证实了该方法的实际应用价值。

title: Evaluation of LLM-Based Software Engineering Tools: Practices, Challenges, and Future Directions
authors: Utku Boran Torun, Veli Karakaya, Ali Babar, Eray Tüzün
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly embedded in software engineering (SE) tools, powering applications such as code generation, automated code review, and bug triage. As these LLM-based AI for Software Engineering (AI4SE) systems transition from experimental prototypes to widely deployed tools, the question of what it means to evaluate their behavior reliably has become both critical and unanswered. Unlike traditional SE or machine learning systems, LLM-based tools often produce open-ended, natural language outputs, admit multiple valid answers, and exhibit non-deterministic behavior across runs. These characteristics fundamentally challenge long-standing evaluation assumptions such as the existence of a single ground truth, deterministic outputs, and objective correctness. In this paper, we examine LLM evaluation as a general, task-dependent concept through the lens of SE tasks. We discuss why reliable evaluation is essential for trust, adoption, and meaningful assessment of LLM-based tools, summarize the current state of evaluation practices, and highlight their limitations in realistic AI4SE settings. We then identify key challenges facing current approaches, including the absence of stable ground truth, subjectivity and multi-dimensional quality, evaluation instability due to non-determinism, limitations of automated and model-based evaluation, and fragmentation of evaluation practices. Finally, we outline future directions aimed at advancing LLM evaluation toward more robust, scalable, and trustworthy methodologies, to stimulate discussion on principled evaluation practices that can keep pace with the growing role of LLMs in SE.
title_zh: 基于大语言模型的软件工程工具评估：实践、挑战与未来方向
abstract_zh:
大型语言模型（LLMs）正越来越多地嵌入软件工程（SE）工具中，为代码生成、自动化代码审查以及缺陷分类等应用提供支持。随着这些基于LLM的软件工程人工智能（AI4SE）系统从实验性原型逐步走向广泛部署，如何可靠地评估其行为这一问题变得尤为关键，却仍未得到充分解答。与传统的软件工程或机器学习系统不同，基于LLM的工具通常生成开放式、自然语言形式的输出，存在多个有效答案，并在不同运行中表现出非确定性行为。这些特性从根本上挑战了长期以来关于评估的假设，例如单一真实答案的存在、确定性输出以及客观正确性的标准。

本文从软件工程任务的角度，将LLM评估视为一个普遍且依赖于具体任务的概念进行探讨。我们阐述了为何可靠的评估对于建立信任、推动采纳以及实现对基于LLM工具的有效衡量至关重要；总结了当前评估实践的现状，并指出现有方法在真实AI4SE场景中的局限性。随后，我们识别出当前评估方法面临的关键挑战，包括缺乏稳定的“真实答案”基准、质量评价的主观性与多维性、因非确定性导致的评估不稳定性、自动化与基于模型评估方法的局限性，以及评估实践本身的碎片化问题。

最后，本文提出了未来研究方向，旨在推动LLM评估向更稳健、可扩展和可信的方法演进，以激发关于能够跟上LLM在软件工程中日益重要角色的规范化评估实践的深入讨论。

title: Factual and Edit-Sensitive Graph-to-Sequence Generation via Graph-Aware Adaptive Noising
authors: Aditya Hemant Shahane, Anuj Kumar Sirohi, Tanmoy Chakraborty, Prathosh A P, Sandeep Kumar
abstract: Fine-tuned autoregressive models for graph-to-sequence generation (G2S) often struggle with factual grounding and edit sensitivity. To tackle these issues, we propose a non-autoregressive diffusion framework that generates text by iterative refinement conditioned on an input graph, named as Diffusion Language Model for Graphs (DLM4G). By aligning graph components (entities/relations) with their corresponding sequence tokens, DLM4G employs an adaptive noising strategy. The proposed strategy uses per-token denoising error as a signal to adaptively modulate noise on entity and relation tokens, improving preservation of graph structure and enabling localized updates under graph edits. Evaluated on three datasets, DLM4G consistently outperforms competitive G2S diffusion baselines trained on identical splits across both surface-form and embedding-based metrics. DLM4G further exceeds fine-tuned autoregressive baselines up to 12x larger (e.g., T5-Large) and is competitive with zero-shot LLM transfer baselines up to 127x larger. Relative to the strongest fine-tuned PLM baseline, DLM4G improves factual grounding (FGT@0.5) by +5.16% and edit sensitivity (ESR) by +7.9%; compared to the best diffusion baseline, it yields gains of +3.75% in FGT@0.5 and +23.6% in ESR. We additionally demonstrate applicability beyond textual graphs through experiments on molecule captioning, indicating the method's generality for scientific G2S generation.
title_zh: 基于图感知自适应噪声的事实性与编辑敏感型图到序列生成
abstract_zh: 针对图到序列生成（G2S）任务，微调的自回归模型通常在事实一致性与编辑敏感性方面表现不佳。为解决这些问题，我们提出了一种非自回归的扩散框架——基于图的扩散语言模型（DLM4G），该模型通过迭代精炼的方式，根据输入图生成文本。DLM4G通过将图中的组件（实体/关系）与其对应的序列标记对齐，并采用一种自适应加噪策略，利用每个标记的去噪误差作为信号，动态调节实体和关系标记上的噪声水平，从而更好地保留图结构，并在图结构发生修改时实现局部化更新。在三个数据集上的实验表明，DLM4G在表面形式和基于嵌入的评估指标上均持续优于在相同训练划分下对比的先进G2S扩散基线。此外，DLM4G的表现超越了参数量大12倍的微调自回归基线（如T5-Large），并可与参数量高达127倍的零样本大语言模型迁移基线相媲美。相较于最强的微调预训练语言模型基线，DLM4G在事实一致性（FGT@0.5）上提升+5.16%，在编辑敏感性（ESR）上提升+7.9%；相比最佳的扩散基线，其在FGT@0.5上提升+3.75%，在ESR上提升+23.6%。我们还通过分子图像描述生成等实验，验证了该方法在非文本图场景下的适用性，进一步证明了其在科学领域G2S生成任务中的通用性。

title: A2DEPT: Large Language Model-Driven Automated Algorithm Design via Evolutionary Program Trees
authors: Bin Chen, Shouliang Zhu, Beidan Liu, Yong Zhao, Tianle Pu, Huichun Li, Zhengqiu Zhu
abstract: Designing heuristics for combinatorial optimization problems (COPs) is a fundamental yet challenging task that traditionally requires extensive domain expertise. Recently, Large Language Model (LLM)-based Automated Heuristic Design (AHD) has shown promise in autonomously generating heuristic components with minimal human intervention. However, most existing LLM-based AHD methods enforce fixed algorithmic templates to ensure executability, which confines the search to component-level tuning and limits system-level algorithmic expressiveness. To enable open-ended solver synthesis beyond rigid templates, we propose Automated Algorithm Design via Evolutionary Program Trees (A2DEPT), which treats LLMs as system-level algorithm architects. A2DEPT explores the vast program space via a tree-structured evolutionary search with hybrid selection and hierarchical operators, enabling iterative refinement of complete algorithms. To make open-ended generation practical, we enforce executability with a lightweight program-maintenance loop that performs feedback-driven repair. In experiments, A2DEPT consistently outperforms representative LLM-based baselines on both standard and highly constrained benchmarks. On the standard benchmarks, it reduces the mean normalized optimality gap by 9.8% relative to the strongest competing AHD baseline.
title_zh: A2DEPT：基于大语言模型驱动的进化程序树自动算法设计
abstract_zh: 为组合优化问题（COPs）设计启发式算法是一项基础但极具挑战性的任务，传统上需要大量的领域专业知识。近年来，基于大语言模型（LLM）的自动化启发式设计（AHD）方法在无需大量人工干预的情况下，展现出自主生成启发式组件的潜力。然而，现有的大多数基于LLM的AHD方法依赖于固定的算法模板以保证可执行性，这将搜索范围局限于组件级别的调优，限制了系统级算法表达能力的发挥。为了突破刚性模板的束缚，实现开放式的求解器生成，我们提出了基于进化程序树的自动化算法设计方法（A2DEPT），将大语言模型视为系统级算法架构师。A2DEPT通过树状结构的进化搜索，在混合选择策略与分层操作符的协同下探索广阔的程序空间，实现对完整算法的迭代优化。为使开放式生成具备实际可行性，我们引入轻量级的程序维护循环，通过反馈驱动的方式进行自动修复，确保生成代码的可执行性。实验结果表明，A2DEPT在标准基准和高度约束的复杂基准上均显著优于代表性LLM-based AHD基线方法。在标准基准测试中，其平均归一化最优性差距相比最强的现有AHD基线降低了9.8%。

title: Constraint-Guided Multi-Agent Decompilation for Executable Binary Recovery
authors: Yifan Zhang, Xiaohan Wang, Yueke Zhang, Kevin Leach
abstract: Decompilation -- recovering source code from compiled binaries -- is essential for security analysis, malware reverse engineering, and legacy software maintenance. However, existing decompilers produce code that often fails to compile or execute correctly, limiting their practical utility. We present a multi-agent framework that transforms decompiled code into re-executable source through Multi-level Constraint-Guided Decompilation (MCGD). Our approach employs a hierarchical validation pipeline with three constraint levels: (1) syntactic correctness via parsing, (2) compilability via GCC, and (3) behavioral equivalence via LLM-generated test cases. When validation fails, specialized LLM agents iteratively refine the code using structured error feedback. We evaluate our framework on 1,641 real-world binaries from ExeBench across three decompilers (RetDec, Ghidra, and Angr). Our framework achieves 84-97% re-executability, improving baseline decompiler output by 28-89 percentage points. In comparison with state-of-the-art LLM-based decompilation methods using the same GPT-4o backbone, our approach (84.1%) outperforms LLM4Decompile (80.3%), SK2Decompile (73.9%), and SALT4Decompile (61.8%). Our ablation study reveals that execution-based validation is critical: compile-only approaches achieve 0% behavioral correctness despite 91-99% compilation rates. The system converges efficiently, with 90%+ binaries reaching correctness within 2 iterations at an average cost of $0.03-0.05 per binary. Our results demonstrate that constraint-guided agentic refinement can bridge the gap between raw decompiler output and practically useful source code.
title_zh: 约束引导的多智能体反编译技术在可执行二进制文件恢复中的应用
abstract_zh:
反编译——从已编译的二进制文件中恢复源代码——对于安全分析、恶意软件逆向工程以及遗留软件维护至关重要。然而，现有的反编译工具生成的代码常常无法正确编译或执行，严重限制了其实际应用价值。本文提出一种多智能体框架，通过**多层次约束引导的反编译（Multi-level Constraint-Guided Decompilation, MCGD）**，将反编译后的代码转化为可重新执行的源代码。

我们的方法采用分层验证流水线，包含三个层级的约束：(1) 通过解析确保语法正确性；(2) 通过GCC编译器验证可编译性；(3) 通过大语言模型（LLM）生成的测试用例验证行为等价性。当某一层验证失败时，专门设计的LLM智能体将基于结构化的错误反馈，迭代式地对代码进行优化与修复。

我们在ExeBench提供的1,641个真实世界二进制文件上，针对三种主流反编译器（RetDec、Ghidra 和 Angr）进行了评估。实验结果表明，本框架实现了84%至97%的可重执行率，相较于基线反编译器输出，性能提升达28至89个百分点。与使用相同GPT-4o核心的最先进LLM驱动反编译方法相比，我们的方法（84.1%）显著优于LLM4Decompile（80.3%）、SK2Decompile（73.9%）和SALT4Decompile（61.8%）。

消融实验进一步揭示：基于执行的验证至关重要。仅依赖编译检查的方法尽管具备91%-99%的编译成功率，但行为正确率却为0%。而我们的系统具有高效收敛能力，90%以上的二进制文件在平均两次迭代内达到正确性，单个二进制的平均成本仅为0.03至0.05美元。

综上所述，本研究证明：通过约束引导的智能体式代码精炼机制，能够有效弥合原始反编译输出与真正可用源代码之间的鸿沟，为高质量反编译技术的发展提供了新范式。

title: SeaEvo: Advancing Algorithm Discovery with Strategy Space Evolution
authors: Sichun Luo, Yi Huang, Haochen Luo, Fengyuan Liu, Guanzhi Deng, Lei Li, Qinghua Yao, Zefa Hu, Junlan Feng, Qi Liu
abstract: LLM-guided evolutionary search has emerged as a promising paradigm for automated algorithm discovery, yet most systems track search progress primarily through executable programs and scalar fitness. Even when natural-language reflection is used, it is often used locally in mutation prompts or stored without an explicit population-level organization of strategic directions. As a result, evolutionary search can struggle to distinguish syntactically different implementations of the same idea, preserve lower-fitness but strategically promising directions, or detect when an entire family of strategies has saturated. We introduce \model, a modular strategy-space layer that elevates natural-language strategy descriptions from transient prompt context to first-class population-level evolutionary state in LLM-driven program search. \model augments each candidate program with an explicit natural language strategy description and uses this representation in three ways: Strategy Articulation turns mutation into a diagnose-direct-implement process; Stratified Experience Retrieval organizes the archive into strategy clusters and selects inspirations by behavioral complementarity; and Strategic Landscape Navigation periodically summarizes effective, saturated, and underexplored strategy families to guide future mutations. Across mathematical algorithm discovery, systems optimization, and agent-scaffold benchmarks, \model improves the underlying evolutionary backbones in most settings, with particularly large gains (21% relative improvement) on open-ended system optimization tasks. These results suggest that persistent strategy representations provide a practical mechanism for improving the robustness and efficiency of LLM-guided evolutionary search, suggesting a path toward compound AI systems that accumulate algorithmic knowledge over time.
title_zh: 海 Evo：通过策略空间演化推动算法发现
abstract_zh: 基于大语言模型（LLM）引导的进化搜索已成为自动化算法发现的一种有前景范式，然而大多数系统仍主要通过可执行程序和标量适应度来追踪搜索进展。即使在使用自然语言反思时，这种反思也往往仅限于突变提示中的局部应用，或被存储而缺乏明确的种群级战略方向组织。因此，进化搜索难以区分同一思想的不同语法实现，无法保留低适应度但具有战略潜力的方向，也难以察觉某一类策略是否已达到饱和。我们提出了 \model，一个模块化的策略空间层，将自然语言策略描述从临时的提示上下文提升为 LLM 驱动程序搜索中首屈一指的种群级进化状态。\model 为每个候选程序附加显式的自然语言策略描述，并以三种方式利用这一表示：**策略表述**（Strategy Articulation）将突变过程转化为“诊断—定向—实现”的流程；**分层经验检索**（Stratified Experience Retrieval）将档案库按策略聚类组织，并根据行为互补性选择灵感来源；**战略景观导航**（Strategic Landscape Navigation）定期总结有效、饱和及未充分探索的策略家族，以指导未来的突变方向。在数学算法发现、系统优化以及代理模板基准测试中，\model 在多数场景下均提升了底层进化框架的表现，尤其在开放式的系统优化任务中取得了显著提升（相对性能提高21%）。这些结果表明，持久化的策略表征为提升 LLM 引导进化搜索的鲁棒性与效率提供了一种切实可行的机制，也为构建能够随时间积累算法知识的复合型人工智能系统开辟了道路。

title: Closing the Loop: A Software Framework for AI to Support Business Decision Making
authors: Jeffrey Wong, Antoine Creux
abstract: Create an idea, prototype it, evaluate if users like it, then learn. It is the circle of business. If AI can operate in all parts of the circle, it will enable rapid iteration and learning speeds for businesses. Experiment platforms that deploy experiments to evaluate return on investment for businesses are abundant, but systems that help businesses learn personalization, mechanisms, and what to ideate next, are rare. Among technologies that do exist, they cannot be well orchestrated in a single software interface that can be safely and efficiently leveraged by an AI agent. These challenges make it difficult to teach an AI agent how to learn within a robust experimentation framework, and difficult for an AI agent to operate and iterate for the business. We offer a two part solution: one half that is rooted in mathematical reductions to contain complexity, and one half that is rooted in software design to optimize for orchestration, software safety, and multiplicity. Our solution, a software framework, moves beyond the simple treatment effect computed as a difference in means. To create a better understanding of a business and its customers, we enrich causal analysis with heterogeneous effects, policy algorithms, mediation analysis, and forecasts of effects. To have an AI complete the iteration cycle faster, we further enrich the analysis with variance reduction and anytime valid inference. The enrichments are made compatible across different types of experiments, and are presented in a single software interface that is usable in an AI agent. We evaluate the approach on various objectives in experiment analysis, and show that the framework improves code correctness, reduces lines of code, and is more performant than a baseline analysis constructed by a vanilla agent.
title_zh: 闭环：一种支持企业决策的人工智能软件框架
abstract_zh:
构思一个创意，进行原型设计，评估用户是否喜欢，然后从中学习——这正是商业循环的核心。如果人工智能（AI）能够贯穿这一循环的每一个环节，它将极大加速企业的迭代与学习速度。目前，用于评估企业投资回报率的实验平台已十分丰富，但能够帮助企业理解个性化策略、机制原理，并指导下一步创意方向的系统却极为稀缺。尽管已有部分技术具备相关能力，却难以在单一软件界面中实现良好协同，无法被AI代理安全高效地调用。这些挑战使得训练AI代理在稳健的实验框架内自主学习变得困难，也阻碍了AI代理在企业运营中实现快速迭代。

为此，我们提出一个双管齐下的解决方案：一半基于数学简化以控制复杂性，另一半则依托软件工程设计，优化系统的协同性、安全性与可扩展性。我们打造了一套软件框架，突破了传统仅通过均值差异计算处理效应的局限。为更深入理解企业及其客户，该框架融合了异质性处理效应、政策算法、中介分析以及效果预测等先进方法。为了进一步提升AI完成迭代周期的速度，我们还引入方差缩减技术和随时有效的推断方法。

所有这些增强功能均兼容多种类型的实验设计，并统一集成于一个面向AI代理的友好软件界面中。我们在多个实验分析目标上对本方案进行了评估，结果表明：相比由普通AI代理构建的基准分析，该框架显著提升了代码正确率，减少了代码行数，并展现出更高的性能表现。

title: Experience in Synthesizing Combinational Self-Timed Circuits and Verifying the Results
authors: Leonid Plekhanov, Nikolai Morozov, Georgi Orlov
abstract: This paper addresses the problem of ensuring correctness in the self-timed (ST) digital circuit design, which provide a fault-tolerant alternative to conventional synchronous circuitry. The ST circuit's distinctive properties include an absence of logic hazards, sustained operability under extreme environmental conditions, and inherent stuck-at fault detection. These properties are achieved through a specific computational organization: dual-rail (i.e., two-phase) signal encoding, strict alternation between data and spacer phases, and explicit indication of the completion of transient processes. However, these properties render the ST circuit design and verification a nontrivial task. The paper observes a working method for automated synthesis of combinational ST circuits in synthesizable Verilog and proposes a comprehensive methodology for automated verification of the synthesized results. The verification approach is centered on two key aspects: preservation of logical functionality with respect to the original non-self-timed specification and satisfaction of internal self-timed correctness criteria. The methodology comprises the following stages: test generation for both the reference synchronous circuit and synthesized ST circuit, an ST protocol functional validation, evaluation of functional coverage achieved by the test suite, and automated regression analysis of circuit testing based on structured logging. The proposed approach aligns with modern coverage-driven verification practices. The methodology enables scalable verification across hundreds of test cases—a capability that is critically important during the active development of an ST circuit synthesizer.
title_zh: 在综合组合型自定时电路并验证结果方面的经验
abstract_zh: 本文针对自定时（ST）数字电路设计中的正确性保障问题展开研究，该类电路为传统同步电路提供了一种容错替代方案。ST电路具有诸多独特特性：不存在逻辑冒险、在极端环境条件下仍能持续运行，以及具备固有的 stuck-at 故障检测能力。这些特性通过特定的计算组织方式实现：采用双轨（即两相）信号编码、严格交替的数据阶段与间隔阶段，以及对瞬态过程完成状态的显式指示。然而，这些特性也使得ST电路的设计与验证变得极为复杂。本文提出一种用于可综合Verilog代码中自动合成组合型ST电路的工作方法，并进一步构建了一套完整的自动化验证方法论，以验证所生成结果的正确性。该验证方法聚焦于两个核心方面：一是保持与原始非自定时规格说明一致的逻辑功能，二是满足内部自定时正确性准则。整个方法论包含以下步骤：针对参考同步电路和生成的ST电路分别进行测试用例生成；执行ST协议的功能性验证；评估测试集所达到的功能覆盖率；以及基于结构化日志的自动化回归测试分析。所提出的验证方法与现代覆盖率驱动的验证实践高度契合。该方法能够支持跨数百个测试案例的可扩展验证，这一能力在ST电路综合器的积极开发阶段尤为关键。

title: Analysis of SLM Applicability to Prevent Information Leaks Using Business Process Optimization Tools on the PIX RPA Example
authors: Lyudmila Gadasina, Sergey Lapshin
abstract: The article discusses the issue of confidential information leakage when using robotic process automation (RPA) technologies to automate some business processes. This issue is relevant due to the lack of strict security measures in the development of RPA solutions, which can result in the unauthorized dissemination of trade secrets, personal data and other sensitive information. The goal of this work is to develop and test a method for preventing leaks by integrating a system that verifies the data intended to transfer outside the company using small language models into RPA workflows. The PIX Studio development platform was used for the implementation and testing of the proposed method. In the course of our research, we proposed an architecture for a secure RPA solution. We developed a special test set to detect confidential information in heterogeneous corporate data. To evaluate the effectiveness of our solution, we experimentally tested five small language models using precision, recall, and F1-score metrics. The Gemma and Mistral models demonstrated the best results, confirming the feasibility of using small language models for local data analysis without transferring information to external servers. The practical significance of this work lies in the proposal of a ready-made leak control mechanism that can be integrated into RPA platforms. This corresponds with the current trends in intelligent automation and the implementation of DevSecOps (development, security, operations) principles in corporate processes.
title_zh: 基于PIX RPA案例的业务流程优化工具在防止信息泄露中的SLM适用性分析
abstract_zh: 本文讨论了在使用机器人流程自动化（RPA）技术自动执行部分业务流程时，可能出现的机密信息泄露问题。这一问题尤为突出，原因在于RPA解决方案开发过程中缺乏严格的安保措施，可能导致商业秘密、个人数据及其他敏感信息被未经授权地传播。本文的研究目标是提出并测试一种防止信息泄露的方法，即在RPA工作流中集成一个利用小型语言模型验证拟外传数据的系统。所提出的方案在PIX Studio开发平台上进行了实现与测试。研究过程中，我们设计了一种安全的RPA解决方案架构，并开发了一个专门的测试数据集，用于检测企业异构数据中的敏感信息。为评估该方案的有效性，我们通过精确率、召回率和F1分数等指标，对五种小型语言模型进行了实验测试。结果显示，Gemma和Mistral模型表现最佳，证实了小型语言模型可在本地完成数据分析，无需将数据传输至外部服务器，具有可行性。本研究的实际意义在于提出了一种可直接集成到RPA平台中的现成泄漏控制机制，契合当前智能自动化的发展趋势，以及企业在业务流程中实施DevSecOps（开发、安全、运维）原则的实践需求。

title: Identification of Anomalies in the Chernoff Faces Data Using Neural Networks
authors: Ksenia Zhernova
abstract: For visual analysis of computer security data, various visualization models are used to display quantitative and qualitative metrics. However, glyph-based visualizations are relatively rarely used to solve security issues. This may be due to the fact that glyphs are designed to compare states, but do not allow an operator to compare data directly. However, glyphs can be efficient for monitoring changes in the state of various systems, including computer security systems. One example of glyph visualization is Chernoff faces. The purpose of this work is to test the efficiency of Chernoff faces in identifying vulnerable JavaScript code using convolutional neural networks (CNN), compare the efficiency of various feature selection methods for subsequent visualization of these features in the form of Chernoff faces, and identify possible problems in their analysis that make it difficult to use them. The experimental results show high values of accuracy, precision, recall, and f1-score metrics when analyzing CNN images generated based on features selected using embedded methods based on random forest (RF) and logistic regression (LR).
title_zh: 使用神经网络识别切尔诺夫人脸数据中的异常值
abstract_zh: 在计算机安全数据的视觉分析中，各种可视化模型被用来展示定量和定性指标。然而，基于图符（glyph-based）的可视化方法在解决安全问题时相对较少使用。这可能是因为图符设计主要用于比较状态，而不允许操作员直接对比数据。但图符在监测各类系统（包括计算机安全系统）状态变化方面具有高效性。一个典型的图符可视化例子是切尔诺夫脸（Chernoff faces）。本文旨在测试切尔诺夫脸在利用卷积神经网络（CNN）识别易受攻击的JavaScript代码方面的效率，比较不同特征选择方法在后续以切尔诺夫脸形式进行可视化时的效率，并识别其分析过程中可能存在的问题，这些问题是导致其难以应用的原因。实验结果表明，当基于随机森林（RF）和逻辑回归（LR）等嵌入式特征选择方法所选特征生成CNN图像进行分析时，准确率、精确率、召回率和F1分数等指标均表现出较高水平。

title: Cooperative Edge Caching with Large Language Model in Wireless Networks
authors: Ning Yang, Wentao Wang, Lingtao Ouyang, Haijun Zhang
abstract: Cooperative edge caching within spatially overlapping coverage zones introduces intricate coupling among Base Station (BS) caching decisions, rendering online content replacement highly sensitive to both spatial topology and temporal content reuse. Conventional heuristics often suffer from myopia, while Deep Reinforcement Learning agents typically rely on brittle numerical state/action representations and necessitate computationally prohibitive retraining under topological or traffic dynamics. This paper studies a centralized, cooperative multi-BS cache-replacement controller driven by a Large Language Model (LLM) within a deterministic text-to-action execution loop. At each time slot, the global cache state is deterministically rendered into a prompt encapsulating the cache inventory of each BS, the current set of deduplicated requests, and multi-scale frequency summaries. The LLM generates exactly one decision line per BS, after which a strict parser and feasibility checker either accept a feasible joint action or deterministically fall back to the all-BS no-operation (NoOp) action. We align the LLM through a two-stage training paradigm: initially performing completion-only Supervised Fine-Tuning on look-ahead expert trajectories to acquire action syntax and robust initialization, followed by Group Relative Policy Optimization. The latter employs an “opportunity-aware” reward mechanism, utilizing the multi-step cooperative hit rate gain relative to a NoOp baseline as the primary signal, together with an explicit invalid-output penalty and an annealed early-stage NoOp correction that prevents degenerate passivity. We focus on a reactive replacement setting with equal-sized files, at most one replacement per BS per slot, and insertion candidates restricted to current-slot requests. Under a frozen-trajectory evaluation protocol that reuses identical request traces and association graphs across methods, the proposed orchestrator approaches a single-step exhaustive-search reference (0.610 vs. 0.617 in a standard 5-BS scenario), surpasses classical baselines (e.g., +4.1% over least-frequently used), and exhibits robust zero-shot transfer across cache capacity, library size, popularity skewness, and user density. Code is available at <uri xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">https://github.com/gracefulning/CoopLLM-Cache</uri>.
title_zh: 无线网络中基于大语言模型的协作边缘缓存
abstract_zh:
在空间重叠覆盖区域内的协作式边缘缓存，引入了基站（BS）缓存决策之间的复杂耦合关系，使得在线内容替换对空间拓扑结构和时间维度上的内容重用模式高度敏感。传统启发式方法通常存在短视问题，而深度强化学习代理则普遍依赖脆弱的数值状态/动作表示，并且在拓扑或流量动态变化时需要计算开销巨大的重新训练。本文提出一种由大型语言模型（LLM）驱动的集中式、多基站协作缓存替换控制器，其采用确定性的“文本到动作”执行循环。在每个时隙中，全局缓存状态被确定性地转化为一个提示（prompt），该提示包含每个基站的缓存库存、当前去重后的请求集合以及多层次的频率汇总信息。随后，LLM为每个基站生成恰好一行决策，再经由严格的解析器与可行性检查器判断：若决策可行，则采纳联合动作；否则，系统将确定性地回退至所有基站均不操作（NoOp）的默认行为。

我们通过两阶段训练范式对LLM进行对齐：首先，在前瞻专家轨迹上仅进行补全任务的监督微调（Supervised Fine-Tuning），以习得正确的动作语法并获得鲁棒的初始化；其次，采用分组相对策略优化（Group Relative Policy Optimization）。后者引入了一种“机会感知”的奖励机制，以相对于NoOp基线的多步协作命中率增益作为主要信号，同时结合显式的无效输出惩罚项，以及随训练进程逐渐衰减的早期阶段NoOp修正机制，有效防止策略陷入消极无为的退化状态。

研究聚焦于一种反应式替换场景，假设文件大小相等，每基站每时隙最多执行一次替换，且插入候选仅限于当前时隙的请求。在冻结轨迹评估协议下（即各方法复用相同的请求序列与关联图），所提出的协调器在标准5基站场景中接近单步穷举搜索参考性能（0.610 vs. 0.617），显著优于经典基线（例如较最不常用策略提升4.1%），并在缓存容量、内容库规模、流行度偏斜度及用户密度等不同条件下展现出稳健的零样本迁移能力。代码已开源，地址为：<uri xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">https://github.com/gracefulning/CoopLLM-Cache</uri>。

title: AI-Driven Penetration Testing for ARM Systems: Experimental Evaluation and Deployment Framework Across Four Paradigms
authors: Matthew Ragsdale, Vijayalakshmi Ramasamy
abstract: ARM-based systems are widely deployed in edge and IoT settings, where penetration-testing tools must operate under strict memory, power, and thermal constraints, yet prior work offers limited deployment-oriented guidance for these platforms. We experimentally evaluated four AI paradigms—traditional machine learning (ML), deep learning (DL), large language models (LLMs), and reinforcement learning (RL)—across three ARM platform tiers (Raspberry Pi 5, Radxa ROCK 5B Plus, NVIDIA Jetson Nano), collecting over 8,000 measurements of accuracy, memory, latency, power, and thermal behavior. Traditional ML achieved up to 98.1% accuracy with 162 MB peak memory usage, while a combined optimization pipeline for DL (pruning, INT8 quantization-aware training, distillation, and platform tuning) achieved 92.6% accuracy with a 93% model-size reduction. In contrast, the evaluated LLM configurations exhibited memory and latency requirements that exceeded practical edge budgets on these devices, whereas RL supported lightweight on-device inference via off-device training, using 52–254 MB during execution. We introduce the ARM AI Security Benchmark (AASB) framework to standardize evaluation methodology and provide deployment-oriented baselines for ARM platforms.
title_zh: 面向ARM系统的AI驱动渗透测试：四种范式下的实验评估与部署框架
abstract_zh:
基于ARM的系统广泛部署于边缘计算和物联网（IoT）场景中，这些环境对渗透测试工具提出了严格的内存、功耗和散热限制。然而，以往的研究在针对此类平台的部署指导方面仍显不足。我们对四种人工智能范式——传统机器学习（ML）、深度学习（DL）、大语言模型（LLMs）以及强化学习（RL）——在三个不同层级的ARM平台（Raspberry Pi 5、Radxa ROCK 5B Plus、NVIDIA Jetson Nano）上进行了实验评估，共收集了超过8,000组关于准确率、内存占用、延迟、功耗及热行为的数据。

结果显示，传统机器学习方法在峰值内存使用仅162 MB的情况下，最高可达到98.1%的准确率；而通过结合剪枝、INT8量化感知训练、模型压缩与平台调优的优化流程，深度学习模型在实现93%模型尺寸缩减的同时，仍保持了92.6%的准确率。相比之下，所评估的大语言模型配置在内存和延迟方面的需求远超这些设备的实际边缘计算预算。而强化学习则通过离线训练支持轻量级的本地推理，在运行期间仅需52至254 MB内存。

为解决评估方法不统一的问题，我们提出了“ARM AI安全基准”（ARM AI Security Benchmark, AASB）框架，旨在标准化评估流程，并为ARM平台提供面向实际部署的性能基线参考。

title: The Use of Artificial Intelligence as an Expert
authors: Oleg Gorshkov, Vladimir Postnikov, Zhanna Mingaleva
abstract: This paper explores the potential of applying artificial intelligence technologies as expert systems across various industries in order to address workforce shortages. Different types of intelligent systems are examined, and the benefits and risks associated with integrating modern technologies for conducting various forms of assessment are discussed. Particular emphasis is placed on the importance of complying with legal regulations, data security requirements, and ethical considerations. To ensure efficient processing of large volumes of incoming requests and data, the paper proposes a solution that combines the "queue" and "observer" design patterns, enabling flexible distribution of computational load and resilience to activity spikes when large amounts of information must be processed. The solution is based on a multi-agent system, which makes it possible to combine multiple AI agents and improve the accuracy of expert evaluation.
title_zh: 人工智能作为专家的运用
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了将人工智能技术作为专家系统应用于多个行业，以应对劳动力短缺的潜力。文章分析了不同类型的智能系统，并讨论了在各种评估形式中整合现代技术所带来的益处与风险。特别强调了遵守法律法规、数据安全要求以及伦理考量的重要性。为确保能够高效处理大量 incoming 请求和数据，本文提出了一种结合“队列”与“观察者”设计模式的解决方案，该方案可实现计算负载的灵活分配，并在需要处理大量信息时具备抵御活动高峰的韧性。该解决方案基于多智能体系统，使得多个AI智能体得以协同工作，从而提升专家评估的准确性。

title: Models and Algorithms for Building AI-Powered Assistants: A Case Study of PetTech Platform Vetsy.ru
authors: Gleb Guskov, Alexandr Shcherbina, Ramil Zayneev
abstract: This paper presents research results aimed at developing tools for creating AI-Powered assistants in applied information systems. Modern domain-specific information systems increasingly incorporate intelligent user assistants. These assistants serve as domain consultants, performing rapid diagnostics of discussed objects, recommending solutions to achieve target states, and maintaining natural language dialogue with users. Currently, software engineering lacks standardized architectures for intelligent information systems and established methodologies for integrating AI-Powered assistants. The article presents research results in the form of new methods and tools for machine learning (fine tuning) of available language models, as well as means for integrating intelligent assistants with fact databases, problem domain rule bases, and information system modules. The article examines the effectiveness of modern language models (LLM Efficiency) from the perspective of intelligent assistant development (AI/LLM Agent). The reliability of dialogues generated by the intelligent assistant is ensured through connections to both local fact databases and internet search capabilities, utilizing Retrieval-Augmented Language Models. The paper investigates the efficiency of modern language models (LLMs) for developing AI/LLM agents, ensuring response reliability through connections with both local knowledge bases and web search capabilities. The research was conducted during development and implementation of a veterinary assistance system (PetTech) featuring an advanced Russian-language intelligent assistant, available at www.vetsy.ru
title_zh: 构建人工智能助手的模型与算法：以PetTech平台Vetsy.ru为例的案例研究
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了旨在开发应用于信息系统中人工智能助手的工具的研究成果。现代领域特定的信息系统正越来越多地集成智能用户助手。这些助手充当领域顾问，能够对讨论对象进行快速诊断，推荐实现目标状态的解决方案，并与用户保持自然语言对话。然而，当前软件工程领域尚缺乏智能信息系统的标准化架构以及集成人工智能助手的成熟方法论。本文提出了新的机器学习方法与工具（如语言模型的微调），以及将智能助手与事实数据库、问题领域规则库及信息系统模块集成的手段。文章从智能助手（AI/LLM Agent）开发的角度，评估了现代大语言模型（LLM Efficiency）的有效性。通过连接本地事实数据库和互联网搜索能力，利用检索增强型语言模型（Retrieval-Augmented Language Models），确保了智能助手生成对话的可靠性。研究还探讨了现代大语言模型（LLMs）在开发AI/LLM代理方面的效率，通过结合本地知识库与网络搜索能力来保障响应的可靠性。本研究是在开发与实施一个具备先进俄语智能助手的兽医辅助系统（PetTech）过程中完成的，该系统现已上线，可通过 www.vetsy.ru 访问。

title: Consensus-Based Graph Knowledge Construction from Large Language Models for Reliable Decision Support in Industry 4.0 Systems
authors: A.Y. Philippovich, A. K. Bilalov
abstract: This study proposes and evaluates a consensus-based framework for constructing reliable bipartite graph knowledge representations from multiple Large Language Model (LLM) outputs, targeting decision-support applications in Industry 4.0 and medical AI systems. Three frontier LLMs (GPT-5.2 Pro, Claude Opus 4.6, and Gemini 3 Pro) independently extracted structured knowledge from 12 domain-specific documents (industrial predictive maintenance and clinical triage corpora, approximately 48,000 tokens). The extracted graphs were aggregated using a weighted consensus algorithm with configurable acceptance threshold and validated through automated structural diagnostics. The results reveal statistically significant improvements for the consensus method over baselines: (1) the consensus graph achieves an edge-level F1 score of 0.80, representing an 8.1% improvement over the best single model (GPT-5.2 Pro, F1 = 0.74) and a 19.4% improvement over naive union aggregation (F1 = 0.67); (2) structural anomalies are reduced by 81.3% compared with single-model outputs and by 93.9% compared with naive union; (3) the structural violation rate decreases to V = 0.02; (4) automated semantic coherence analysis confirms that the consensus graph achieves a mean coherence score of 0.88, with only 2.1% of edges falling below the plausibility threshold. Ablation experiments demonstrate that each framework component contributes meaningfully to overall performance. This study contributes to understanding how multi-model consensus mechanisms can improve the reliability of automatically generated knowledge graphs and demonstrates the practical value of combining automated structural validation with semantic coherence analysis for safety-critical domains.
title_zh: 基于共识的大型语言模型图知识构建，用于工业4.0系统中的可靠决策支持
abstract_zh: 本研究提出并评估了一种基于共识的框架，用于从多个大型语言模型（LLM）的输出中构建可靠的二分图知识表示，旨在支持工业4.0和医疗人工智能系统中的决策应用。三种前沿大模型（GPT-5.2 Pro、Claude Opus 4.6 和 Gemini 3 Pro）独立地从12份领域特定文档（工业预测性维护与临床分诊语料库，约48,000个词元）中提取结构化知识。所提取的图数据通过一种可配置接受阈值的加权共识算法进行聚合，并经由自动化的结构诊断方法进行验证。结果表明，该共识方法在统计学上显著优于基线方法：（1）共识图在边级别上达到0.80的F1分数，相较于表现最佳的单个模型（GPT-5.2 Pro，F1 = 0.74）提升了8.1%，较朴素并集聚合方法（F1 = 0.67）提升了19.4%；（2）结构异常减少81.3%（相比单模型输出），减少93.9%（相比朴素并集）；（3）结构违规率降至V = 0.02；（4）自动化语义一致性分析显示，共识图的平均一致性得分为0.88，仅有2.1%的边低于合理性阈值。消融实验表明，框架中的每一组件均对整体性能有显著贡献。本研究深化了对多模型共识机制如何提升自动生成知识图谱可靠性机制的理解，并展示了将自动化结构验证与语义一致性分析相结合在安全关键领域中的实际价值。

title: Large Language Model-Assisted Evolutionary Neural Architecture Search for Cognitive Diagnosis
authors: Shangshang Yang, Linrui Qin, Xiaoshan Yu, Ziwen Wang, Ye Tian, Xueming Yan, Haiping Ma, Xingyi Zhang
publish: IEEE Transactions on Emerging Topics in Computational Intelligence
abstract: Neural architecture search (NAS) has made remarkable progress in various field tasks and is also used in fields like cognitive diagnosis (CD) in intelligent education. Due to the optimization challenges of the tree-like and variable-length model topology raised by the search space, existing NAS for CD intuitively uses evolutionary algorithms and empirically develops a genetic operator based on basic tree modifications. Nevertheless, the operator's stochastic nature may impede rapid convergence, as the choice of modifications is random and ignores parent information, thereby failing to generate effective models from most parents. To this end, this paper proposes a novel evolutionary NAS approach for CD based on a tailored genetic operator, where the operator incorporates powerful large language models (LLMs) as its key components for tree-encoded model generation. Specifically, three roles of LLMs are defined in the LLM-assisted operator through structured prompt engineering that explicitly defines the LLM's role, constrains the architecture representation, standardizes the output format, and incorporates Hall-of-Fame guidance. The first LLM focuses on exploitation, enhancing model performance through minor incremental adjustments to existing architectures, the second emphasizes exploration, introducing innovative models through creative combinations that have not been previously considered, and the third aims at balancing the contributions of the first two, ensuring a harmonious integration of exploitation and exploration. In each generation, only one role of LLMs is used through an LLM role-switching strategy. Additionally, the empirically-built genetic operator is also employed for partial models' generation for better diversity. Experiments on several datasets show the performance superiority of models searched by the proposed approach over handcrafted models and automatically-designed models. Besides, the effectiveness of the LLM-assisted operator in accelerating algorithm convergence is validated.
title_zh: 大语言模型辅助的进化神经架构搜索在认知诊断中的应用
abstract_zh: 神经架构搜索（NAS）在多个领域任务中取得了显著进展，也被应用于智能教育中的认知诊断（CD）等领域。由于搜索空间带来的树状结构和可变长度模型拓扑所带来的优化挑战，现有的CD领域NAS方法通常采用进化算法，并基于基础的树结构修改经验性地设计遗传算子。然而，这种算子具有随机性，可能导致收敛速度缓慢，因为其修改选择是随机的，且忽略了父代信息，从而难以从大多数父代生成有效的模型。针对这一问题，本文提出一种面向CD任务的新型进化NAS方法，其核心是设计了一种定制化的遗传算子，该算子以强大的大语言模型（LLMs）作为关键组件，用于生成编码为树结构的模型。具体而言，通过结构化提示工程，定义了LLM在辅助算子中的三个角色：第一，LLM专注于利用（exploitation），通过对现有架构进行微小的增量调整来提升模型性能；第二，LLM强调探索（exploration），通过创造性地组合此前未被考虑过的结构，引入新颖的模型；第三，LLM旨在平衡前两者贡献，确保利用与探索之间的和谐融合。在每一代进化过程中，通过LLM角色切换策略仅启用其中一个角色。此外，还保留了经验构建的遗传算子，用于部分模型的生成，以增强多样性。在多个数据集上的实验表明，所提出方法搜索得到的模型在性能上优于手工设计和自动设计的模型。同时，验证了LLM辅助算子在加速算法收敛方面的有效性。

title: Shift Register Implementation in Self-Timed Circuits
authors: Yuri Stepchenkov, Yuri Diachenko, Dmitri Stepchenkov
abstract: This article focuses on the self-timed (ST) shift register development optimized for use with synchronous and ST environments. Combinational ST circuits traditionally employ dual-rail data encoding with a spacer. The state of the dual-rail signal reflects the information bit and its current phase: working or spacer. They do not require a phase control signal to synchronize the data flow. This leads to certain specific features of their use in memory units, i.e., triggers, counters, and registers, which actively interact with the combinational ST environment. This article examines the design features of an ST shift register with dual-rail data inputs and outputs and proposes implementation options that ensure their use as serial-to-parallel and parallel-to-serial ports, ring shifters, and other ST register units. Both the cause-and-effect relationship between the data input and the phase control input determine the ST shift register circuitry specifics. The proposed implementation options for the input, internal, and output bits of the ST shift register, designed in the template forms, provide ST shift register synthesis formalization and automation based on the synthesized circuit's original Verilog description.
title_zh: 自定时电路中的移位寄存器实现
abstract_zh: 本文重点研究了专为同步和自定时（ST）环境优化的自定时（ST）移位寄存器的设计。传统的组合型ST电路通常采用双轨数据编码并辅以间隔信号。双轨信号的状态反映了信息位及其当前阶段：工作状态或间隔状态。由于无需相位控制信号来同步数据流，因此这类电路在与组合型ST环境积极交互的存储单元（如触发器、计数器和寄存器）中具有特定的应用特征。本文探讨了具有双轨数据输入和输出的ST移位寄存器的设计特点，并提出了若干实现方案，可使其用作串行-并行转换端口、并行-串行转换端口、环形移位寄存器以及其他ST寄存器单元。数据输入与相位控制输入之间的因果关系决定了ST移位寄存器电路的具体结构。所提出的基于模板形式设计的ST移位寄存器输入、内部及输出位的实现方案，实现了ST移位寄存器设计的规范化与自动化，其基础是根据已合成电路的原始Verilog描述进行综合。

title: Agentic AI for 6G: A New Paradigm for Autonomous RAN Security Compliance_supp1-3681685.pdf
authors: Mahdi Boloursaz Mashhadi
abstract: Agentic AI systems are emerging as powerful tools for automating complex, multi-step tasks across various industries. One such industry is telecommunications, where the growing complexity of next-generation radio access networks (RANs) opens up numerous opportunities for applying these systems. Securing the RAN is a key area, particularly through automating the security compliance process, as traditional methods often struggle to keep pace with evolving specifications and real-time changes. In this article, we propose a framework that leverages LLM-based AI agents integrated with a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipeline to enable intelligent and autonomous enforcement of security compliance. An initial case study demonstrates how an agent can assess configuration files for compliance with O-RAN Alliance and 3GPP standards, generate explainable justifications, and propose automated remediation if needed. We also highlight key challenges such as model hallucinations and vendor inconsistencies, along with considerations like agent security, transparency, and system trust. Finally, we outline future directions, emphasizing the need for telecom-specific LLMs and standardized evaluation frameworks.
title_zh: 6G中的代理型人工智能：自主无线接入网安全合规的新范式_supp1-3681685.pdf
abstract_zh: 智能代理型AI系统正成为自动化复杂多步骤任务的强大工具，广泛应用于各个行业。其中，电信行业尤为突出，随着下一代无线接入网络（RAN）复杂性的不断提升，为这类系统提供了广阔的应用前景。保障RAN安全是关键领域之一，尤其体现在通过自动化安全合规流程来应对传统方法难以跟上不断演进的技术规范和实时变更的挑战。本文提出一种框架，利用基于大语言模型（LLM）的AI代理，并结合检索增强生成（RAG）管道，实现对安全合规的智能化与自主化执行。初步案例研究展示了该代理如何评估配置文件是否符合O-RAN联盟和3GPP标准，生成可解释的合规理由，并在必要时提出自动修复建议。同时，我们还指出了若干关键挑战，如模型幻觉和厂商间不一致性问题，并强调了代理安全性、透明度以及系统可信度等重要考量因素。最后，文章展望了未来发展方向，重点强调了开发面向电信领域的专用大语言模型以及建立标准化评估体系的迫切需求。

title: Development and Testing of an Intelligent VR Simulator with an Adaptive AI-Based System for Training Specialists in Information-Measuring and Control Systems
authors: Damir Akchurin, Alik Khafizov, Konstantin Kryshko
abstract: The article presents the results of the development and experimental testing of an intelligent VR simulator designed to improve the effectiveness of practical training for specialists in the field of information-measuring and control systems (IMCS). The relevance of the research is driven by the challenges of modern engineering education: high equipment costs, the inability to simulate non-standard situations, limited access to complex technical systems, and the lack of a personalized learning approach. The proposed solution integrates virtual and augmented reality technologies with artificial intelligence (AI) elements, including computer vision based on YOLOv8 for recognizing industrial automation objects and the Mistral 7B language model operating on the Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) principle for contextual learner support. The scientific novelty lies in the creation of an adaptive educational system capable of analyzing user actions in real time, identifying typical errors, and forming individual learning trajectories. During experimental testing involving USPTU students, the practical effectiveness of the simulator was proven: the time to complete laboratory work decreased by 15.79%, and the number of errors during the assembly of measuring equipment decreased by 31.81% compared to traditional methods. Methodological recommendations for scaling the technology into the curricula of technical universities have been developed. The research results are supported by three certificates of state registration of computer programs.
title_zh: 基于自适应AI系统的智能VR模拟器的开发与测试：用于信息测量与控制系统专业人员培训
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了为提高信息测量与控制系统（IMCS）专业人员实践培训效果而开发并经过实验测试的智能虚拟现实（VR）模拟器的研究成果。该研究具有重要的现实意义，主要源于现代工程教育面临的诸多挑战：设备成本高昂、难以模拟非标准情境、复杂技术系统访问受限，以及缺乏个性化的学习方法。所提出的解决方案将虚拟现实（VR）与增强现实（AR）技术相结合，并融入人工智能（AI）元素，包括基于YOLOv8的计算机视觉技术用于识别工业自动化设备，以及采用检索增强生成（RAG）原理运行的Mistral 7B语言模型，以提供上下文相关的学习支持。本研究的科学创新之处在于构建了一个自适应教育系统，能够实时分析用户操作行为，识别典型错误，并生成个性化的学习路径。在对乌拉尔联邦大学（USPTU）学生进行的实验测试中，验证了该模拟器的实际有效性：完成实验任务的时间减少了15.79%，测量设备组装过程中的错误数量相比传统方法降低了31.81%。同时，已制定出将该技术推广至理工类高校课程体系的方法论建议。研究成果已获得三项计算机软件国家登记证书的支持。

title: Ten Years of Chaos Engineering… Now What?
authors: Joshua Owotogbe, Stefano Fossati, Indika Kumara, Dario Di Nucci, Damian A. Tamburri, Willem-Jan van den Heuvel
abstract: Modern software systems are increasingly built on distributed cloud-native architectures that offer scalability and agility but also introduce significant complexity and fragility. Chaos engineering aims to help make complex systems resilient to various failures that can occur in production environments. This article examines the evolution of chaos engineering over the past decade in academia and industry. Our analysis suggests that chaos engineering has evolved from a niche testing strategy to a foundational discipline for building dependable systems at scale. The next generation of this testing practice should focus on LLM-assisted test automation, hybrid testing frameworks, and integration of chaos engineering into compliance and governance workflows.
title_zh: 十年混沌工程，如今何去何从？
abstract_zh: 现代软件系统越来越多地基于分布式云原生架构构建，这类架构虽然提供了可扩展性和敏捷性，但也带来了显著的复杂性和脆弱性。混沌工程旨在帮助系统在生产环境中应对各种可能出现的故障，从而提升其韧性。本文探讨了过去十年中混沌工程在学术界和工业界的演进历程。我们的分析表明，混沌工程已从一种小众的测试策略发展为构建大规模可靠系统的基础性学科。下一代混沌工程测试实践应重点关注大语言模型（LLM）辅助的测试自动化、混合测试框架，以及将混沌工程融入合规与治理工作流程。

title: An Automated Algorithm for Auditing Encryption Policies in Software Systems
authors: Jasur Baratov, Shohruh Mahkamov, Jura Kuvandikov
abstract: This paper presents an automated auditing algorithm for evaluating the enforcement of encryption policies in software systems. The proposed approach addresses key limitations of existing auditing practices, including the complexity of heterogeneous configurations, the inconsistency between policy requirements and operational settings, and the reliance on manual inspection. The methodology formalizes encryption policies as structured requirements and evaluates their compliance against configuration and runtime data using deterministic compatibility and risk assessment functions. By aggregating local deviations into a unified risk index, the algorithm provides a quantitative and reproducible measure of system-level non-compliance. The proposed method enables continuous monitoring of encryption policy enforcement across multiple architectural layers, including application, network, and storage components. Experimental evaluation on a test software system demonstrates that the algorithm effectively identifies policy violations, captures their relative impact on security risk, and tracks compliance improvements over successive audit iterations. The results indicate a consistent reduction in the overall risk index following corrective actions applied to cryptographic parameters such as key length, protocol configuration, and certificate management. The presented approach is platform-agnostic and relies on formal modeling rather than heuristic inspection, making it suitable for integration into enterprise and large-scale information systems. The findings confirm that a mathematically grounded auditing framework can enhance the precision, transparency, and repeatability of encryption policy compliance assessment.
title_zh: 软件系统中加密策略审计的自动化算法
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种自动化审计算法，用于评估软件系统中加密策略的执行情况。所提出的方案解决了现有审计实践中的若干关键局限性，包括异构配置的复杂性、策略要求与实际运行环境之间的不一致，以及对人工检查的过度依赖。该方法将加密策略形式化为结构化需求，并利用确定性的兼容性分析与风险评估函数，基于配置数据和运行时数据来评估其合规性。通过将局部偏差聚合为统一的风险指数，该算法提供了一种定量且可重复的系统级非合规性度量方式。所提方法能够实现对多个架构层级（包括应用层、网络层和存储层）中加密策略执行情况的持续监控。在测试软件系统上的实验评估表明，该算法能有效识别策略违规行为，准确捕捉其对安全风险的相对影响，并跟踪多次审计迭代中合规性的改进情况。结果表明，在对密钥长度、协议配置及证书管理等密码参数实施纠正措施后，整体风险指数呈现持续下降趋势。该方法具有平台无关性，依赖于形式化建模而非启发式检查，因此适用于集成到企业级及大规模信息系统中。研究结果证实，基于数学原理的审计框架能够显著提升加密策略合规性评估的精确性、透明度与可重复性。

title: NanoCockpit: Performance-optimized Application Framework for AI-based Autonomous Nanorobotics_supp1-3687493.pdf
authors: Elia Cereda
abstract: Autonomous nano-drones, powered by vision-based tiny machine learning (TinyML) models, are a novel technology gaining momentum thanks to their broad applicability and pushing scientific advancement on resource-limited embedded systems. Their small form factor, i.e., a few 10s grams, severely limits their onboard computational resources to sub-100mW microcontroller units (MCUs). The Bitcraze Crazyflie nano-drone is the de facto standard, offering a rich set of programmable MCUs for low-level control, multi-core processing, and radio transmission. However, roboticists very often underutilize these onboard precious resources due to the absence of a simple yet efficient software layer capable of time-optimal pipelining of multi-buffer image acquisition, multi-core computation, intra MCUs data exchange, and Wi-Fi streaming, leading to sub optimal control performances. Our NanoCockpit framework aims to fill this gap, increasing the throughput and minimizing the system's latency, while simplifying the developer experience through coroutine-based multi-tasking. In-field experiments on three real-world TinyML nanorobotics applications show our framework achieves ideal end-to-end latency, i.e. zero overhead due to serialized tasks, delivering quantifiable improvements in closed-loop control performance (−30% mean position error, mission success rate increased from 40% to 100%).
title_zh: NanoCockpit：面向基于人工智能的自主纳米机器人技术的性能优化应用框架_supp1-3687493.pdf
abstract_zh: 基于视觉的微型机器学习（TinyML）模型驱动的自主纳米无人机，是一项新兴技术，因其广泛的应用前景以及在资源受限嵌入式系统上的科学突破而日益受到关注。这类无人机体积小巧，重量仅几十克，其 onboard 计算资源被严格限制在低于100mW的微控制器单元（MCU）级别。Bitcraze Crazyflie 纳米无人机已成为行业标准，提供可编程的多核MCU，支持底层控制、多核处理和无线通信。然而，由于缺乏一个简单而高效的软件层，能够实现多缓冲图像采集、多核计算、MCU间数据交换及Wi-Fi流传输的时间最优流水线处理，机器人研究人员往往未能充分利用这些宝贵的 onboard 资源，导致控制性能不理想。我们的 NanoCockpit 框架旨在填补这一空白，通过协程式多任务机制，在提升系统吞吐量的同时最大限度降低延迟，简化开发体验。在三个真实世界 TinyML 纳米机器人应用中的现场实验表明，该框架实现了理想的端到端延迟——即无串行任务带来的开销，显著提升了闭环控制性能：平均位置误差降低30%，任务成功率从40%提升至100%。

title: NSGen: A Template-Based Framework to Find Bugs in Computer-Aided Engineering Tools
authors: Xiaochen Li, Peiyu Zou, Hao Liu, Shikai Guo, Zhilei Ren, He Jiang
abstract: Computer-aided engineering (CAE) tools are extensively used in safety-critical domains like aerospace design to simulate real-world physical processes on computers at reduced costs. However, CAE tools are prone to bugs, leading to incorrect simulation and serious design flaws. Existing testing methods have limited success in finding these bugs, since constructing test cases for CAE tools (known as CAE inputs) is challenging, due to the complexity of input parameter constraints and the differences of input syntax for each tool. Therefore, we propose NSGen, a template-based Numerical Simulation test case GENerator for effective CAE input generation. To bridge input differences, NSGen designs general syntax rules that ignore semantic details of CAE inputs but retaining the format and validity of these inputs for different CAE tools. NSGen then designs semantic rules to define the parameters and their intricate constraints (i.e., dependency, exclusion, and extension). By instantiating these rules as templates, valid CAE inputs are generated using a syntax parser implemented by NSGen. Experiments show that NSGen can effectively generate CAE inputs with less than 0.33 second on average, triggering 6.28 to 10.55 times more potential issues than the baseline. Using these inputs, NSGen finds 12 bugs in popular CAE tools, including crash bugs and instability bugs.
title_zh: NSGen：一种基于模板的框架，用于发现计算机辅助工程工具中的缺陷
abstract_zh: 计算机辅助工程（CAE）工具在航空航天设计等安全关键领域被广泛使用，通过在计算机上模拟现实世界的物理过程，在降低成本的同时实现高效分析。然而，CAE工具容易存在缺陷，导致仿真结果错误，进而引发严重的设计问题。现有的测试方法在发现这些缺陷方面成效有限，主要原因在于为CAE工具构建测试用例（即CAE输入）极具挑战性：一方面，输入参数的约束条件复杂；另一方面，不同CAE工具的输入语法各不相同。为此，我们提出NSGen——一种基于模板的数值仿真测试用例生成器，用于高效生成CAE输入。为弥合不同工具间输入格式的差异，NSGen设计了通用的语法规则，忽略CAE输入的语义细节，但保留各类工具输入的格式结构与有效性。同时，NSGen引入语义规则，明确定义参数及其复杂的约束关系（如依赖、互斥和扩展关系）。通过将这些规则实例化为模板，NSGen利用其内置的语法解析器生成有效的CAE输入。实验结果表明，NSGen平均可在0.33秒内生成一个CAE输入，相比基线方法可触发6.28至10.55倍更多的潜在问题。利用这些生成的输入，NSGen成功在主流CAE工具中发现了12个缺陷，包括导致程序崩溃和系统不稳定的严重问题。

title: Token Cost Optimization in an LLM Agent for JSON-Based System Modeling from Dialogue History
authors: Saveliy Lavrentiev, Alexey Dukhanov
abstract: This paper considers an interactive LLM-based agent designed to construct a formal JSON model of a target system from a multi-turn dialogue with a user. For such an agent, we formulate a context management problem with an explicit separation between the textual dialogue history and the structured system state. We propose a cost-aware algorithm that automatically decides when to compress a part of the dialogue into an updated JSON state and then rely on this state instead of repeatedly sending a growing history fragment. The key idea is to compare the accumulated cost of transmitting the uncompressed dialogue segment with the estimated cost of a single state-update step, including both input and output tokens; an update is performed only when this ratio becomes economically favorable. The algorithm is implemented in a prototype agent based on the GigaChat model and evaluated on three modeling scenarios: client flows in an online school, financial flows in machine manufacturing, and a predator–prey population model. Across dialogues of length 20, 32, and 50 turns, the experiments demonstrate a reduction in total token consumption from 19.63 % to 59.54 % compared to a non-optimized baseline, while preserving the dialogue trajectory and perceived answer quality.
title_zh: 基于对话历史的JSON系统建模中LLM代理的令牌成本优化
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的交互式智能体，该智能体通过与用户进行多轮对话，构建目标系统的正式JSON模型。针对此类智能体，我们提出了一个上下文管理问题，并明确区分了文本对话历史与结构化系统状态。为此，我们设计了一种成本感知算法，能够自动决定何时将部分对话内容压缩为更新后的JSON状态，并随后依赖该状态而非重复发送不断增长的对话片段。其核心思想是：比较未压缩对话段落的累计传输成本与单次状态更新步骤的预估成本（包括输入和输出的token数量）；只有当这一比率变得经济上更优时，才执行状态更新操作。该算法已集成至基于GigaChat模型的原型智能体中，并在三个建模场景中进行了评估：在线教育中的客户流程、机械制造中的财务流程，以及捕食者-猎物种群模型。实验结果表明，在对话轮次分别为20、32和50的情况下，与非优化基线相比，总token消耗量减少了19.63%至59.54%，同时保持了对话轨迹的完整性及用户感知的回答质量。

title: Organizing the Educational Process Using Artificial Intelligence for Teaching Secure Programming to Undergraduate Students
authors: Andrey M. Shabalin, Kirill I. Gladkikh, Aleksandr A. Zakharov
abstract: This paper addresses the pressing problem of insufficient preparation of computer science undergraduates in the field of secure software development. It analyzes contemporary research highlighting the significance of this approach to software engineering and identifying a deficit of corresponding skills among early-career professionals. The paper examines the causes of this situation, including the absence of mandatory specialized courses in university curricula. Existing approaches to improving the quality of education in secure programming are reviewed, with particular attention devoted to the use of automated tools. The paper proposes a novel approach to addressing this problem, based on employing artificial intelligence as an intermediary between the student and the instructor, aimed at enhancing the competence of future professionals in ensuring the information security of the software products they develop.
title_zh: 利用人工智能组织教学过程以教授本科生安全编程
abstract_zh: 本文针对计算机科学本科生在安全软件开发领域准备不足这一紧迫问题展开研究。文章分析了当前的研究成果，强调了该方法在软件工程中的重要性，并指出现代早期职业人才普遍缺乏相应的专业技能。论文探讨了造成这一现状的原因，包括高校课程体系中缺乏强制性的专业课程。同时，文章回顾了现有提升安全编程教育质量的方法，特别关注自动化工具的应用。在此基础上，本文提出一种新方法：利用人工智能作为学生与教师之间的中介，旨在提升未来从业人员在保障其所开发软件产品信息安全方面的能力。
